creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,
Can you provide a single patch for your files.
Can you follow the handbook for submitting a new port
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#porting-submitting
If you submit a .diff you also need to add your new port to sysutils/Makefile
You also need to check your port with portlint: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#testing-portlint

thanks in advance
